problem id: 36e96ab0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(6) OR NOT SHR(1)

examples:
  01110010 -> 11000111
  11111010 -> 10000011
  11000001 -> 10011111
  11100000 -> 10001111
  01000000 -> 11011111
  00000101 -> 11111101
  10100110 -> 10101110
  10001101 -> 10111011

query: 00010101
predicted answer: 11110101
